description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular profile and a mix of earthy colors, including gray, brown, and reddish hues. The surface is coarse and uneven, featuring natural fractures, jagged edges, and some smoother patches. One side of the stone displays black alphanumeric markings, likely for cataloging or identification purposes. The coloration is mottled, with rusty orange and brown streaks interspersed with lighter gray and off-white areas, suggesting mineral inclusions. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or signs of artificial modification. Its overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to natural weathering, giving it a raw, unpolished look.
description: A rugged, irregular stone with mottled gray, brown, and reddish colors, featuring rough surfaces and catalog markings on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the flattest face of the stone, with visible black alphanumeric markings and a mix of gray and brown coloration.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the stone's jagged, angular top and a concentration of rusty brown and orange hues.
description_view_2: The broadest side is visible here, dominated by muted gray and brown tones with less surface detail and no markings.
description_view_3: This view reveals a sloped, uneven surface with a blend of gray and brown, and more pronounced textural roughness.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, or landscaped garden
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a natural obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled coloration with irregular patches of gray, brown, and reddish-orange; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with visible natural fractures and some surface discoloration, indicating moderate weathering.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or manicured urban surfaces but can blend with natural landscaping elements or other stones.

license_info.creator_display_name: UQ School of Earth and Environmental Sciences
